creator: Exgentic

evidence.text:
General agent evaluation framework

Evaluate any agent on any benchmark in the simplest way possible

--- ## What is Exgentic? Exgentic is a universal evaluation framework that enables standardized testing of AI agents across diverse benchmarks and domains. It provides a consistent interface for evaluating any agent on any benchmark, making it easy to compare performance, reproduce results, and ensure your agent works reliably across different tasks and environments. ## Who is it for? 1.
